data.title: Iowa women’s basketball crushed by UCLA, finishes West Coast trip winless
data.description: Following Thursday night’s upset loss at USC, eighth-ranked Iowa made the 13.7-mile cross-town trip to take on second-ranked UCLA. The Hawkeyes came up short, 88-65, finishing their trip to Los Angeles with a 0-2 record. The Bruins owned the paint for all four quarters, where they outscored the Hawkeyes by 30 points. Ava Heiden led Iowa’s scorers with 19 points, all coming in the second half. The second-year had all but three of the Hawkeyes’ third-quarter points. Hannah Stuelke had 13 points, along with Taylor Stremlow’s 12 points. Chit-Chat Wright provided 10 points and six assists...
